Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 307}Since you just transferred here, do you find yourself getting lost inside the school?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 307}I don't blame you... Where do you need help getting to?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 307}Leave the classroom and go down the stairs to the right.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 307}Then, go through the double doors on your right-hand side and head straight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 307}Leave the classroom and go down the stairs to the right.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 307}The culture clubs like the art club room will be right there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 307}It's located right across the hall from this room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 307}Leave the classroom and go down the stairs to the left.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 307}While facing the shoe lockers, go right to enter the hallway where the faculty office is located.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 307}But walking all the way to each location is quite a hassle, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 307}If only we could get somewhere with the push of a button, just like in games nowadays.[n]{f 1 1}
